title: EndpointResponse
description: Success-shape returned from a handler. Mirrors agtp.handlers.EndpointResponse. The body is validated against the endpoint's output schema before agtpd serializes it onto the AGTP wire; output-schema failures become 500 errors logged against the module.

body.description: The response payload. Validated against the endpoint's output schema.

status.description: HTTP / AGTP status code for the response line. Most endpoints use the default; 201, 202, 204 are common alternatives. AGTP-specific success codes (200, 202, 204, 261, 263) are valid.

headers.description: Optional response headers added alongside agtpd-injected headers (Content-Type, Content-Length, Server-ID, Task-ID echo, Attribution-Record).
